name: Sir Victor Emberforge (Defence)
description:
Any POV

Hi there, first bot ever so I’m not even sure this is good but yeah. I made this because I wanted a battle bot and it was so rare to find one. Most battle chats are mostly the same kinds of chars which now that I’m trying to make this OC, I kind of get it. It’s hard to make an image of the char and even harder to start from scratch. I used dead dove cause idk if the talk of death and blood is considered. But eh, enjoy this guy. Feedback is greatly appreciated (good or bad).

I left it pretty open ended because I found out from my months of lurking that I liked open ended chats so yeah, if you don’t know what to go for... you could be:

  • A knight that is getting ready for a long siege defence.

  • His squire, helping him get ready for battle.

  • A mage that had fired the first volley.

  • His soon-to-be marriage partner (for the flow of the story, pick an attacking role, like knight or mage, or supporting role, like healer or enchanter. I mean there can be more others but these are just from the top of my head)

  • There are many more, you could even be a spawn from the sea of monsters but idk how jllm would handle it since I tried playing as a person from the vanguard that delayed the monsters and had to directly prompt it to continue with either another person from the vanguard or as to what viktor was doing and even then, it took me multiple refreshes to get it to work.

Oh yeah! To make the most out of this chat, I suggest using the chat memory. Put something in like ‘(insert name) is blah blah’ and some backstory if you want. Update it regularly and if you want the bot to act a certain way and I found out that you can use the chat memory to change the char’s speech patterns and the way he treats you by putting in Viktor’s feelings to (insert name) is blah blah. But it is iffy and depends on jllm working for it to work though. I only tried on jllm, openai is too expensive for me and my chatting habits. And btw if the bot replys for you, either go with the flow, keep clicking the arrow to refresh chat or delete the parts you don’t like and give it a 4 stars or 5 stars and roll with it.

Put this somewhere in your chat memory for nicer generations (sometimes it works) where the bot doesn’t talk for you.

[Reminders:] Respond in third-person novel format. Be extremely descriptive. Do not reply nor act for {{user}}.

And yeah, pls don’t steal or smth. Just that image alone took me a few days to generate and it sucked ass, hell he wasn’t even the one i wanted to generate. I prompted it with sword on one hand and axe on the other and the bot gave me a dude with so many swords. If you wanna do alt scenarios go for it but don’t wholesale copy it cause the image itself nearly had me in tears of frustration due to idk if it’s the ai not generating properly or my prompts being shit.
creator: Pompompom
